name: Four Treasure Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Boned, Skinned Chicken Breast Ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince half of the water chestnuts and combine with chicken, 2 tablespoons onions, soy sauce, mustard, and flour.
2. Reserve remaining water chestnuts and onions in a large saucepan.
3. Mix broth, sherry, and garlic powder; bring to a boil.
4. Drop chicken mixture by teaspoonfuls into broth.
5. Add carrots and simmer for 3 to 4 minutes until meatballs are cooked.
6. Add remaining water chestnuts, green onions, and pea pods.
7. Heat through and serve immediately.
